title: anathallis citrina
intro: Anathallis citrina, also known as the yellow anathallis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and delicate, leafy stems. The medicinal properties of Anathallis citrina include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the management of anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Anathallis citrina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
